title: Archivists
description: Appraise, edit, and direct safekeeping of permanent records and historically valuable documents. Participate in research activities based on archival materials.

tasks.text: Organize archival records and develop classification systems to facilitate access to archival materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide reference services and assistance for users needing archival materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare archival records, such as document descriptions, to allow easy access to information.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Create and maintain accessible, retrievable computer archives and databases, incorporating current advances in electronic information storage technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish and administer policy guidelines concerning public access and use of materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct activities of workers who assist in arranging, cataloguing, exhibiting, and maintaining collections of valuable materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Preserve records, documents, and objects, copying records to film, videotape, audiotape, disk, or computer formats as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Research and record the origins and historical significance of archival materials.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Locate new materials and direct their acquisition and display.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Authenticate and appraise historical documents and archival materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate educational and public outreach programs, such as tours, workshops, lectures, and classes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Specialize in an area of history or technology, researching topics or items relevant to collections to determine what should be retained or acquired.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select and edit documents for publication and display, applying knowledge of subject, literary expression, and presentation techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
